title: NDLEA Cementing Partnership With UK National Crime Agency
description: Cementing partnership: Chairman/Chief Executive of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Retd), OFR with Chris Trimmer, the UK National Crime Agency (NCA ) Regional Liaison Officer West Africa when the latter c
html: Cementing partnership: Chairman/Chief Executive of NDLEA, Brig. Gen. MB Marwa (Retd), OFR with Chris Trimmer, the UK National Crime Agency (NCA ) Regional Liaison Officer West Africa when the latter came on a visit to the Agency’s national headquarters in Abuja today Monday 4th April 2022
